translation.hero_badge: The future of your barbershop has arrived
translation.hero_description: Complete management with integrated cashback, affiliate system, and automatic payments. All in one place.
translation.features_description: Automate sales, appointments, and payments. Focus on what matters: your client.
translation.feat_calendar_desc: Your clients book online, 24/7. You just focus on the service.
translation.feat_pixtax_desc: Accept any payment method with integrated fees starting at 1.49%. Automatic split.
translation.feat_cashback_desc: Clients spend, earn credit, and always return organically.
translation.feat_affiliates_desc: Your clients refer friends and earn. Scale your business on autopilot.
translation.feat_whatsapp_desc: Reminders, confirmations, and promotions. Everything synced without manual effort.
translation.feat_finance_desc: Complete dashboard for owners. Know exactly what comes in, goes out, and stays in the cash register.
translation.feat_profiles_desc: Separate access for Salon Owners, Professionals (barbers), Clients, and Affiliates.
translation.feat_accountant_desc: Simplified integration for your accountant to extract reports and billing with one click.
translation.feat_setup_desc: No slow implementations. Create your account and start scaling immediately.
translation.pricing_description: 7 days free. No card. No commitment. Immediate results.
translation.footer_description: The ultimate platform for scaling and managing modern barbershops.
